name: Bank Linth LLB AG
summary: Bank Linth LLB AG provides various banking products and services for private and corporate clients. It offers private, shareholder, foreign currency, association, property, youth, student, and savings accounts; mortgages and construction loans; credit products; pension products; and credit cards. The company also provides investment advice, asset management, consulting and investment, payment, locker, and e-banking services. It serves its customers through 20 locations in Switzerland.  The company was founded in 1848 and is based in Uznach, Switzerland. Bank Linth LLB AG operates as a subsidiary of Liechtensteinische Landesbank Aktiengesellschaft.
